'''Bandomeer''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Bandomeer system/Legends|Bandomeer system]]. It was deep orange in color.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]''</ref>

{{Star-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'' {{1st}}
